markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and BrainyBees for backlink building services.](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [BrainyBees offers white-label backlink building services, with a focus on SaaS companies and agencies](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $3,000-$3,500 for 20 links per month, with flexibility based on client needs and target difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [BrainyBees uses a mix of owned assets, personalized outreach, and industry connections to build high-quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [The company emphasizes a strategic approach, balancing links to content, landing pages, and homepages based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Topics

### BrainyBees' Backlink Building Approach

  - [Uses a mix of owned assets (dozens built since 2019) and personalized outreach](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Avoids automated tools like Pitchbox, focusing on high-quality, personalized communication](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Employs a team of experts with deep industry knowledge and connections](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Tracks and manages link building across 55+ projects using custom systems](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Pricing and Packages

  - [Starting package: 20 links for $3,000-$3,500 per month](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Pricing varies based on target difficulty and client requirements](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Minimum engagement typically 10 links per client per month](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Flexible with white-label arrangements for agencies](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

### Reporting and Communication

  - [Monthly reports provided at the end of each month](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Can accommodate more frequent updates for larger projects (e.g., 140 links/month)](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Willing to join client Slack channels for communication](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Typically delivers first batch of links within 12-15 days of starting](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)

### Strategic Considerations

  - [Recommends a mix of content, landing page, and homepage links (e.g., 50% content, 40% landing pages, 10% homepage)](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Advises against building too many homepage links for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [Emphasizes the importance of fixing technical SEO issues before aggressive link building](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)

### Industry Insights

  - [Notes increasing demand for backlink services post-Google updates and AI content generation](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Observes that many SaaS companies still prioritize landing page links over content links](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Highlights the challenge of finding skilled backlink builders who can manage multiple projects](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to provide a document outlining GrowthX's scope and requirements](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Kinga to send an email with pricing details and engagement options](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
  - [Discuss potential for creating educational content about backlink building together](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Explore setting up a longer-term engagement (3+ months) with flexible client allocation](https://fathom.video/share/NJyWpRH7sy8RMoryCzJ2oM2T1mJ8C-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=2285.0)
